raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Fentanyl kills an average of 18 Californians each day.",
    "Fentanyl is responsible for one in every five deaths of young people in California.",
    "Fentanyl kills more youth than all other drugs combined.",
    "The number of youth who died of fentanyl in Santa Clara County increased by 365 percent over a few years.",
    "135 young people died from fentanyl in Santa Clara County in 2021.",
    "SB 10 would require school safety plans to include strategies for the prevention and treatment of opioid overdoses.",
    "SB 10 is intended to create opioid prevention and education programs in schools.",
    "The California Department of Education is required to develop training materials on the use of emergency opioid antagonists for school personnel under SB 10.",
    "SB 10 will incentivize County Working Groups on Fentanyl Overdose/Abuse Prevention."
  ]
}
```
